posts.text:
Yes. Thank God. We need to support and celebrate this judge. She’s one of the few with the courage to treat these scumbags exactly as they deserve to be treated. We don’t have to be held hostage by the worst among us. We can actually punish them.


Collin Rugg (@CollinRugg)

NEW: Family of a Texas teen loses it as judge sentences him to 25 years in prison for robbing a convenience store.

Judge Raquel West was seen torching 18-year-old Caden James Fontenette before handing out the sentence.

"Th

I’m surprised my Canada number is so high




captive dreamer (@captive_dreamer)

Would love to see some of these big grifter conspiracy slop accounts post their audience metrics.  Something tells me we would get some (not so) surprising results





— https://nitter.net/captive_dreamer/status/2034296806126043534#m
These numbers should be public so that I can mute any account that doesn’t pull at least 70 percent USA

Say what you want about the guy but he obviously ran an extraordinary campaign


Current Report (@Currentreport1)

BREAKING:

Kim Jong-un has won North Korea's parliamentary elections with 99.93% of the vote.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Currentreport1/status/2034002694755811570#m

Hey I recognize this show




Collin Rugg (@CollinRugg)

Kouri Richins, who was just found guilty of killing her husband by poisoning his drink, once sat down for a 5-minute interview with a local show in Utah to promote her book.  

Richins appeared emotionless as she promoted the book.  

"My husband passed away unexpectedly last year... It completely took us all by shock..."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/CollinRugg/status/2034021941380845705#m
This show’s absolute refusal to vet anyone before letting them on the air is pretty extraordinary
Time for our annual St Patrick’s Day viewing of a cinematic masterpiece

Rebellion in our home. Some of the kids are claiming that I force them to watch this every year and it’s “boring.” Sounds like we need to increase the viewings to three times a year until morale improves.

There is no good moral reason why she should not simply be taken outside the morning after her conviction and hanged. This woman has lost her right to exist.


New York Post (@nypost)

Grief author Kouri Richins found guilty of fatally poisoning her husband for his $4 million estate trib.al/q1Dik9d





— https://nitter.net/nypost/status/2033705691936960863#m

This is, of course, retarded. The great men of history were deeply introspective. They wrote memoirs, journals, diaries, poetry. They were philosophers, theologians. They yearned. They were romantics. They were in fact much more introspective than the average person today. 

However it is true that none of the great men of history, or any men at all (or even women), were sitting around whining to therapists about their feelings. I think the difference (and maybe this is what he's trying to get a

Wow man you got me. I changed my view on the topic. How did you know? Is it because I openly admitted in the first sentence of the post that I changed my view on the topic? Wow you really dunked on me here. I don’t know if I’ll be able to recover.


Vladimir Suvorov (@VladimirSuvor)

There's nothing wrong with this viewpoint. It's similar to my own. But a year or two ago, Matt Walsh was not only arguing the TOTAL OPPOSITE, but doing so sneeringly, declaring that those who wanted their kids to st

Reading Blood Meridian. I wonder if there will ever be an author like Cormac McCarthy again, or if we’ve seen the last of the truly great writers. Every sentence he composes is art, like a painting. You see and feel what he’s trying to convey. He wrestles with big things, the human condition, good and evil. He doesn’t give you answers but he leaves you with a lot to think about. An absolute master of his craft. Not the last, I hope, but I don’t know.
The education system is a mess
Leftist CRASHES OUT After 95-Year-Old Woman Suggests He Cover His Tattoos
The Real History of the Civil War | Official Trailer
Men of History vs Today
Apparently none of the great men of history were introspective
You might be a narcissist if...
They're not going to fix the homelessness problem
Instructions for dealing with stupid people
Silicon Valley Billionaire Shares The Terrifying Way He Lives His Life
How are these guys still U.S. citizens?
